title: dichrocephala sonchifolia
intro: Dichrocephala sonchifolia, also known as yin xue cao in Chinese, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and anticoagulant effects. The health benefits of Dichrocephala sonchifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of thrombosis. Herbal preparations of Dichrocephala sonchifolia can be found in traditional Chinese medicine, often in combination with other herbs, and are typically consumed as a tea or capsule.
